title: QWORK® 12Pcs Artificial Roses, Red Roses Artificial Flowers With Long Plastic Stems For Wedding Table Centerpieces, Home Decor
features: 1.Made of lint, these artificial roses mimic the look and feel of real flowers.
2.Perfect for vases, wedding decor, party arrangements, and office embellishments, adding beauty to any setting.
3.Each flower head measures approximately 7cm in diameter, with a total length of 51cm.
4.Easily customize your home decor by pairing these flowers with other florals to create personalized styles.
5.The flower stem adopts new injection molding and contains iron wire, which can be bent at will.
description: Product Description About Qwork Save more, get more No ads, just low prices and good stuff. We keep it simple and make sure you get the best for less. Choose Qwork, where your money works harder for you.
